syntax_14921.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14921.title: On User Lose Group
syntax_14921.description:
Called when a user loses a group.

`event-group` = The group the user lost.

en:
Called when a user loses a group.

`event-group` = The group the user lost.

syntax_14922.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14922.title: On User Lose Permission
syntax_14922.description:
Called when a user loses a permission.

`event-permission` = The permission the user lost.

en:
Called when a user loses a permission.

`event-permission` = The permission the user lost.

syntax_14924.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14924.title: On User Meta Set
syntax_14924.description:
Called when the meta of a user is set.
Only called when meta is SET not unset etc for that case use `user meta remove`

`event-key` = The key e.g. "prefix" or "suffix"
`event-value` = The result that key was set to.

en:
Called when the meta of a user is set.
Only called when meta is SET not unset etc for that case use `user meta remove`

`event-key` = The key e.g. "prefix" or "suffix"
`event-value` = The result that key was set to.

syntax_14928.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14928.title: Has LuckPerms Group
syntax_14928.description:
Returns whether a user has/doesn't have a group.
This is different from Skript's has group condition as with `user` this supports offline players.
syntax_14928.syntax_pattern:
%luckpermsuser% has luckperm[s] group %luckpermsgroup%
%luckpermsuser% (doesn't|does not) have luckperm[s] group %luckpermsgroup%

en:
Returns whether a user has/doesn't have a group.
This is different from Skript's has group condition as with `user` this supports offline players.

syntax_14929.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14929.title: Has LuckPerms Permission
syntax_14929.description:
Returns whether a user has/doesn't have a permission.
This is different from Skript's has permission condition as with `user` this supports offline players.
syntax_14929.syntax_pattern:
%luckpermsuser% has luckperm[s] perm[ission] %string%
%luckpermsuser% (doesn't|does not) have luckperm[s] perm[ission] %string%

en:
Returns whether a user has/doesn't have a permission.
This is different from Skript's has permission condition as with `user` this supports offline players.

syntax_14930.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14930.title: Demote User
syntax_14930.description:
Demotes a user along a track.
If the user is not on the track nothing will happen.

en:
Demotes a user along a track.
If the user is not on the track nothing will happen.

syntax_14931.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14931.title: Grant Group
syntax_14931.description: Adds a group to a user.

en: Adds a group to a user.

syntax_14932.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14932.title: Grant Permission
syntax_14932.description: Adds a permission to a user.

en: Adds a permission to a user.

syntax_14935.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14935.title: Load Player
syntax_14935.description:
Loads a LuckPerms user.
This is required for basically everything relating to users.
syntax_14935.syntax_pattern: (fetch|get) luckperm[s] user [from] %offlineplayer% and store (it|the result) in %objects%

en:
Loads a LuckPerms user.
This is required for basically everything relating to users.

syntax_14936.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14936.title: Promote User
syntax_14936.description:
Promotes a user along a track.
If the user is not on the track or is at end of track, nothing will happen.

en:
Promotes a user along a track.
If the user is not on the track or is at end of track, nothing will happen.

syntax_14937.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14937.title: Revoke Group
syntax_14937.description: Removes a group from a user.

en: Removes a group from a user.

syntax_14938.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14938.title: Revoke Permission
syntax_14938.description: Removes a permission from a user.

en: Removes a permission from a user.

syntax_14940.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14940.title: All Tracks
syntax_14940.description: returns a list of all tracks.

en: returns a list of all tracks.

syntax_14941.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14941.title: Chat Meta Builder
syntax_14941.description:
Creates a builder for a prefix/suffix.
You can add said prefix/suffix to a user or a group via the prefix or suffix expression.
syntax_14941.entries: [{"name": "value", "isRequired": true, "isSection": false}, {"name": "priority", "isRequired": true, "isSection": false}, {"name": "duration", "isRequired": false, "isSection": false}]

en:
Creates a builder for a prefix/suffix.
You can add said prefix/suffix to a user or a group via the prefix or suffix expression.

syntax_14942.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14942.title: Chat Meta Priority
syntax_14942.description: Represents the priority of a chat meta node.

en: Represents the priority of a chat meta node.

syntax_14943.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14943.title: Chat Meta Source
syntax_14943.description:
Represents the source of a chatmeta.
If inherited directly (not from a group) it will return the user's UUID.

en:
Represents the source of a chatmeta.
If inherited directly (not from a group) it will return the user's UUID.

syntax_14947.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14947.title: Prefix
syntax_14947.description:
Returns the primary prefix of a user/group.
If `prefixes` is used it will return a sorted list of all prefixes of the user/group.
Use `ExprChatMetaPriority` to get priority of a prefix.
syntax_14947.syntax_pattern:
[the] [luckperm[s]] prefix[es] of group %luckpermsgroup%
[the] [luckperm[s]] prefix[es] of user %luckpermsuser%

en:
Returns the primary prefix of a user/group.
If `prefixes` is used it will return a sorted list of all prefixes of the user/group.
Use `ExprChatMetaPriority` to get priority of a prefix.

syntax_14948.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14948.title: Suffix
syntax_14948.description:
Returns the primary suffix of a user/group.
If `suffixes` is used it will return a sorted list of all suffixes of the user/group.
Use `ExprChatMetaPriority` to get priority of a suffix.
syntax_14948.syntax_pattern:
[the] [luckperm[s]] suffix[es] of group %luckpermsgroup%
[the] [luckperm[s]] suffix[es] of user %luckpermsuser%

en:
Returns the primary suffix of a user/group.
If `suffixes` is used it will return a sorted list of all suffixes of the user/group.
Use `ExprChatMetaPriority` to get priority of a suffix.

syntax_14949.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14949.title: LuckPerms ChatMeta
syntax_14949.description: A LuckPerms prefix or suffix node.

en: A LuckPerms prefix or suffix node.
A LuckPerms group.
A LuckPerms track.
A LuckPerms user.

syntax_14953.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14953.title: Edit Group
syntax_14953.description:
Creates a section that allows you to modify the properties of the provided group.
After the code in the section has finished the group will be saved asynchronously.

en:
Creates a section that allows you to modify the properties of the provided group.
After the code in the section has finished the group will be saved asynchronously.

syntax_14954.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14954.title: Edit User
syntax_14954.description:
Creates a section that allows you to modify the properties of the provided user.
After the code in the section has finished the user will be saved asynchronously.

en:
Creates a section that allows you to modify the properties of the provided user.
After the code in the section has finished the user will be saved asynchronously.

syntax_14916.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14916.title: On Group Lose Permission
syntax_14916.description:
Called when a group loses a permission.

`event-permission` = The permission that was removed.
`event-group` = The group that lost the permission.

en:
Called when a group loses a permission.

`event-permission` = The permission that was removed.
`event-group` = The group that lost the permission.

syntax_14917.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14917.title: On Group Meta Remove
syntax_14917.description:
Called when the meta of a group is removed.
Only called when meta is REMOVED not set/added to for that case use `group meta set`

`event-key` = The key e.g. "prefix" or "suffix"
`event-value` = The result that key was set to.
`event-group` = The group that lost said meta.

en:
Called when the meta of a group is removed.
Only called when meta is REMOVED not set/added to for that case use `group meta set`

`event-key` = The key e.g. "prefix" or "suffix"
`event-value` = The result that key was set to.
`event-group` = The group that lost said meta.

syntax_14918.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14918.title: On Group Meta Set
syntax_14918.description:
Called when the meta of a group is set.
Only called when meta is SET not unset etc for that case use `group meta remove`

`event-key` = The key e.g. "prefix" or "suffix"
`event-value` = The result that key was set to.
`event-group` = The group that received the meta.

en:
Called when the meta of a group is set.
Only called when meta is SET not unset etc for that case use `group meta remove`

`event-key` = The key e.g. "prefix" or "suffix"
`event-value` = The result that key was set to.
`event-group` = The group that received the meta.

syntax_14919.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14919.title: On Group Receive Permission
syntax_14919.description:
Called when a group receives a permission.
If the permission duration is infinite %event-timespan% will return 0 seconds.

`event-permission` = The permission the group received.
`event-group` = The group that received the permission.
`event-timespan` = The duration the group will have the permission for.

en:
Called when a group receives a permission.
If the permission duration is infinite %event-timespan% will return 0 seconds.

`event-permission` = The permission the group received.
`event-group` = The group that received the permission.
`event-timespan` = The duration the group will have the permission for.

syntax_14920.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14920.title: On User Demote
syntax_14920.description:
Called when a group of a player is updated via a demotion on a.

`event-group` = The group the user was demoted to.
`past event-group` = The group the user had on the track.
`event-track` = The track that the demotion happened on.
syntax_14920.event_values: event-player, event-text, event-types.luckpermsgroup, event-world, past event-types.luckpermsgroup

en:
Called when a group of a player is updated via a demotion on a.

`event-group` = The group the user was demoted to.
`past event-group` = The group the user had on the track.
`event-track` = The track that the demotion happened on.

syntax_14923.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14923.title: On User Meta Remove
syntax_14923.description:
Called when the meta of a user is removed.
Note: This event may be called multiple times if you clear a meta.

`event-key` = The key e.g. "prefix" or "suffix"
`event-value` = The result that key was set to.

en:
Called when the meta of a user is removed.
Note: This event may be called multiple times if you clear a meta.

`event-key` = The key e.g. "prefix" or "suffix"
`event-value` = The result that key was set to.

syntax_14925.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14925.title: On User Promote
syntax_14925.description:
Called when a group of a player is updated via a promotion on a track (/lp user notch promote staff)")
Do note that %past event-group% will be unset if player didn't previously have a group on that track.

`event-group` = The group the user was promoted to.
`past event-group` = The group the user previously had on the track.
syntax_14925.event_values: event-player, event-text, event-types.luckpermsgroup, event-world, past event-types.luckpermsgroup

en:
Called when a group of a player is updated via a promotion on a track (/lp user notch promote staff)")
Do note that %past event-group% will be unset if player didn't previously have a group on that track.

`event-group` = The group the user was promoted to.
`past event-group` = The group the user previously had on the track.

syntax_14926.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14926.title: On User Receive Group
syntax_14926.description:
Called when a user receives a group.
If the group duration is infinite %event-timespan% will return 0 seconds.

`event-group` = The group the user received.
`event-timespan` = The duration the user will have the group for.

en:
Called when a user receives a group.
If the group duration is infinite %event-timespan% will return 0 seconds.

`event-group` = The group the user received.
`event-timespan` = The duration the user will have the group for.

syntax_14927.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14927.title: On User Receive Permission
syntax_14927.description:
Called when a user receives a permission.
If the permission duration is infinite %event-timespan% will return 0 seconds.

`event-permission` = The permission that the user received.
`event-timespan` = The duration the user will have the permission for.

en:
Called when a user receives a permission.
If the permission duration is infinite %event-timespan% will return 0 seconds.

`event-permission` = The permission that the user received.
`event-timespan` = The duration the user will have the permission for.

syntax_14934.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14934.title: Group Members
syntax_14934.description:
Returns a list of UUIDS of users who have the specified group.
Should be relatively fast depending on how many users have a group.

en:
Returns a list of UUIDS of users who have the specified group.
Should be relatively fast depending on how many users have a group.

syntax_14933.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14933.title: Permission Members
syntax_14933.description:
Returns a list of UUIDS of users who have the specified permission.
Should be relatively fast depending on how many users have said permission.
syntax_14933.syntax_pattern: (fetch|get) [the] [luckperm[s]] (users|players) with perm[ission] %string% and store (it|the result) in %objects%

en:
Returns a list of UUIDS of users who have the specified permission.
Should be relatively fast depending on how many users have said permission.

syntax_14939.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14939.title: All Groups
syntax_14939.description:
returns a list of all groups.
This expression will require `luckperms` in it until Skript deprecates their `groups of`.

en:
returns a list of all groups.
This expression will require `luckperms` in it until Skript deprecates their `groups of`.

syntax_14945.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14945.title: Groups Of
syntax_14945.description:
Represents the groups of a user.
This expression will require `luckperms` in it until Skript deprecates their `groups of`.

en:
Represents the groups of a user.
This expression will require `luckperms` in it until Skript deprecates their `groups of`.

syntax_14944.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14944.title: Permissions Of
syntax_14944.description: Represents the permissions of a user.

en: Represents the permissions of a user.

syntax_14946.creator: OwlBe
syntax_14946.title: Permissions Of
syntax_14946.description: Represents the permissions of a user.

en: Represents the permissions of a user.
